head.title: About us | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Moonstone Advocates is a Kampala-based law firm advising individuals and businesses across Uganda. Learn about our story, our approach, and the practice areas we cover.
head.ogDescription: Discover why clients choose us. Our expert Kampala solicitors deliver exceptional service, practical advice and trusted support to help you move forward with confidence.

blocks.html:
About us

A Kampala firm built on clear, practical advice

Moonstone Advocates is an independent law firm based in Kampala, advising individuals, families and businesses across Uganda. We work across corporate, commercial, property, employment, family and dispute matters — bringing the same clarity and care to every client, whatever the size of the matter.

Meet our people

Why choose us

Home
About us

Our story

Moonstone Advocates was founded to offer something straightforward: legal advice that is expert, honest and genuinely helpful. Led by Managing Partner Chris Allen since 2008, the firm has grown around that same principle — that good advice should be clear enough to act on, not just technically correct.

Today our team works across corporate, property, employment, family and dispute matters for clients throughout Kampala and beyond, combining deep sector knowledge with a genuinely personal approach to every case we take on.

Our Service Offerings

1. Corporate & Commercial Advisory

At Moonstone Advocates, we provide practical, commercially focused legal solutions to individuals, businesses, institutions and organisations. Our approach combines legal expertise, industry understanding and client-focused advice to help clients manage risk, protect their interests and achieve their objectives.

We advise businesses at every stage of their growth, from establishment and structuring to expansion and strategic transactions.

Our services include:

  • Company incorporation and business structuring
  • Corporate governance and regulatory compliance
  • Shareholder agreements and corporate documentation
  • Commercial agreements and contract drafting
  • Legal due diligence
  • Business restructuring and reorganisations
  • Mergers, acquisitions and investment transactions
  • Corporate advisory and general business support

2. Tax & Regulatory Advisory

We assist individuals and businesses in managing tax obligations and regulatory compliance.

Our services include:

  • Tax advisory
  • Tax compliance support
  • Regulatory compliance reviews
  • Business licensing and approvals
  • Advisory on statutory obligations
  • Tax dispute support

3. Dispute Resolution

We represent clients in resolving disputes through effective negotiation, mediation, arbitration and court processes.

Our services include:

  • Commercial disputes
  • Civil disputes
  • Debt recovery
  • Contractual disputes
  • Employment disputes
  • Land and property disputes
  • Arbitration and alternative dispute resolution
  • Enforcement of judgments and court orders

4. Real Estate, Land & Property

We provide comprehensive legal support for property owners, investors, developers and businesses.

Our services include:

  • Land transactions
  • Property acquisitions and disposals
  • Conveyancing
  • Lease agreements
  • Real estate due diligence
  • Property development advisory
  • Land dispute resolution
  • Security documentation involving property

5. Employment, Labour & Immigration

We advise employers and employees on workplace relationships and regulatory compliance.

Our services include:

  • Employment contracts
  • Human resource policies and manuals
  • Labour law compliance
  • Disciplinary and termination processes
  • Workplace disputes
  • Employee benefits advisory
  • Immigration and work permit support

6. Family Law

We provide sensitive and practical legal guidance on personal and family-related matters while protecting our clients' interests and privacy.

Our services include:

  • Marriage and matrimonial advisory
  • Divorce and separation matters
  • Child custody and maintenance disputes
  • Family mediation
  • Succession and inheritance planning
  • Wills and estate planning
  • Probate and administration of estates
  • Family property arrangements

7. Banking, Finance & Securities

We provide legal support to financial institutions, lenders, borrowers and businesses in relation to financial transactions and regulatory matters.

Our services include:

  • Loan and facility documentation
  • Security creation and perfection
  • Mortgages, charges and guarantees
  • Banking regulatory advisory
  • Debt recovery and enforcement
  • Financial services agreements
  • Lending and financing transactions
  • Restructuring and insolvency advisory

8. Public Sector & Regulatory Advisory

We advise individuals, businesses and organisations engaging with government institutions and regulated sectors.

Our services include:

  • Regulatory advisory
  • Public procurement support
  • Government contracting
  • Policy and compliance advisory
  • Administrative law matters

9. Energy & Infrastructure

We provide legal support to businesses operating in the energy and infrastructure sectors.

Our services include:

  • Oil and gas law
  • Energy regulatory compliance
  • Infrastructure development and financing
  • Project development agreements
  • Power purchase agreements (PPAs)
  • Environmental and social impact advisory
  • Construction and engineering contracts
  • Public-private partnerships (PPPs)
  • Renewable energy and sustainability advisory

Our Commitment

We deliver solutions that are responsive, commercially practical and aligned with our clients' objectives.

Whether assisting individuals, growing businesses or established institutions, Moonstone Advocates provides trusted legal guidance throughout every stage of the client's journey.

Our commitment to excellence, integrity and client-focused service ensures that we are more than legal advisors—we are strategic partners in our clients' success.

Get in Touch

We're here to listen, advise and deliver practical legal solutions. Reach out to us.

Contact Address

Plot 134, Semwata Road, Ntinda
P.O. Box 189860, Kampala, Uganda

Telephone

+256 (0) 778 616565

hello@moonstone.co.ug
